'''Vesta's blighted longsword''' is an untradeable sword that can be purchased at [[Justine's stuff for the Last Shopper Standing]] for 300 [[Last Man Standing]] points. It requires 75 [[Attack]] both to wield it and to purchase it from the reward shop.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1632741333524676611|date=6 March 2023|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/102529|archivedate=8 March 2023|quote=It'd give that message if your Attack stat were under 75, as that's the req for equipping the item in question. (...)}}

The sword is inactive upon purchase, and must be activated by using {{NoCoins|50000000}} coins on it. Once activated, it becomes equipable, sharing the same stats and [[special attack]] as its [[Vesta's longsword (disambiguation)|other variants]]. However, the blighted longsword can only be used on a [[Bounty Hunter]] world while in the [[Wilderness]], or on any world within the following locations: inside [[Daimon's Crater]],{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1661840865407410192|date=25 May 2023|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/98604|archivedate=25 May 2023|quote=It's checking for Wilderness on a BH world still, as far as I know. Also Clan Wars (subject to a toggle for challenged battles) and casual 1v1 duels in the Emir's Arena.}} [[Castle Wars]], [[Clan Wars]], [[Soul Wars]], the [[TzHaar Fight Pit]], and both the [[player-owned house]] and [[Clan Hall]] combat rings. This restriction applies to both [[Monster killing|PvM]] and [[Player killing|PvP]] combat activities.

If the owner of this sword dies with it in PvP, the sword is lost on death and dropped as {{NoCoins|50000000}} coins if not one of the player's protected items. This is also the case while partaking in the Bounty Hunter activity, unlike the mini-game specific version of [[Vesta's longsword (bh)|Vesta's longsword]], which is kept in its inactive form on death.

In regards to [[Items Kept on Death]], the activated Vesta's blighted longsword has a value of {{NoCoins|50000000}} coins. It '''cannot''' be uncharged to return the coins once activated; you must die in the Wilderness with it to return the coins, but the sword will be lost in the process.

==Special attack==
[[File:Feint.gif|thumb|260px|A player performing Vesta's blighted longsword's special attack.]]
Vesta's blighted longsword has a [[special attacks|special attack]], ''Feint'', that consumes 25% of the player's [[special attack energy]] and deals between 20% and 120% of the user's max hit.

The accuracy of this special attack is rolled against 25% of the opponent's [[defence]].

==Trivia==
* As the [[dwarf multicannon]]'s accuracy depends on the player's accuracy bonus, it will benefit from the high offensive bonuses of Vesta's blighted longsword when equipped on regular game worlds, even though the player cannot directly attack anything with the longsword there.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1634539347960639488|date=11 March 2023|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/98908|archivedate=12 March 2023|quote=[If a player wields a Vesta’s Blighted Longsword, is the accuracy applied to a cannon? The vls retains its stats even outside of target worlds so I was curious considering the +121 slash improves the accuracy despite being unusable.] I think it would work for that, yeah.}}
